title: SATC 150mm Sanding Discs 80PCS 1000 Grit 6 Holes Orbital Sander Discs Hook and Loop Sanding Pads for Random Orbital Sander
features: 【Ultra-fine 1000 Grit】1000 Grit 150mm sanding discs is suitable for achieving extremely high surface gloss.

【Great Quality & Sticks Well】S SATC 150mm sander pads are coated with premium aluminum oxide grains which give our product excellent performance and longer service life. Durable back can sticks well with on hassle on your random orbital sander.

【User Friendly】With Hook & Loop back, 150mm sanding discs can be easily attached to your random orbital sander and replaced when worn up. Try to increase your work efficiency by using our hook and loop sanding discs

【Fits Great】Our sanding discs for electric sander are compatiable with all of the 150mm ramdom orbital sanders available on the market. And it is perfect for smaller jobs but also can be used on big jobs

【Wide Application】Our sandpapers can work on a wide range of surfaces. They are recommended to work on wood/metal parts and surfaces, but they can also be used on non-metal surfaces and handle a variety of abrasives, in particular, grinding, deburring, polishing and derusting
description: Package Included: 80PCS * 1000 Grit Sandpaper Features: - Made of aluminium oxide abrasive. Durable material and make the excellent performance. - Diameter 125mm with 8 pre-pierced holes abrasive paper, suitable for random orbital sander. - Hook and loop sand paper with the velvet backing is more easy and convenient to change and well fitting in the sander during working.
